questionHtml: The average speed of the molecules of a gas is 500 m s−1. The density of the gas is 1.2 kg m−3. Calculate, in kPa, the pressure of the gas.

meta.title: The average speed of the molecules of a gas is 500 m s−1. The density of the gas is 1.2 kg m−3. Calculate, in kPa, the pressure of the gas.
